name: on a re-run the unchanged rules are served from the persisted cache rather than re-materialized
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config-sync.sh" --persist --out view.yaml 2>e.txt; ruby -e 'm=File.read("e.txt").match(/unchanged=(\d+)/); exit((m && m[1].to_i>=118) ? 0 : 1)' && echo unchanged-from-cache 1>&2
